name: InsightsIdempotencyRecord
description: Module-wide replay identity and immutable outcome references for every retained-state or recovery mutation.
schema_def: InsightsIdempotencyRecord {operationId, contractVersion, keyDigest, requestFingerprint, state: Attempting|Succeeded, outcomeKind: Snapshot|NoChange|Deleted|Backup|Restore, outcomeRef, outcomeFingerprint, createdAt, completedAt?}.
Unique key: operationId plus contractVersion plus keyDigest.
Canonical request fingerprint includes all logical input, actor, reason, target or predecessor, selected policies, expected-current fingerprint, and safe normalized path identity where applicable.
Same key and fingerprint returns the prior logical outcome before producer reads or writes; changed fingerprint returns IdempotencyConflict.
Validation and transient failure do not consume a key. If a snapshot outcome was later deleted, replay resolves to metadata-only Deleted and never recreates content.
